name: Crown Equity Holdings, Inc.
summary: Crown Equity Holdings, Inc. (formerly Micro Bio-Medical Waste Systems, Inc., originally Visioneering Corporation) is a Nevada-incorporated company offering consulting services for corporate structure and operations, public relations, news dissemination, and online media advertising. It helps domestic and global companies become public entities in the U.S., provides search engine optimization, and publishes information and press releases for clients across a network of community-targeted websites. Clients pay in cash and/or stock.

products.name: Consulting Services
products.description: Advises companies and individuals on corporate structure and operations globally, including helping companies become public U.S. entities.

products.name: Public Relations and News Dissemination
products.description: Publishes news, press releases, and financial information for publicly and privately held companies across multiple websites.

products.name: Online Media Advertising
products.description: Worldwide online media advertising publishing covering branding, marketing specialties, and search engine optimization for clients.
